ModMetaData.name: Super weapons and armors
ModMetaData.author: keventao
ModMetaData.description:
This mod adds LWOP-style items with Combat Extended support.
Items inspired by LWOP Package (https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2012717312).
Current features: - Joywire: Permanent mood boost implant - HyperVitality Chip: Reduces sleep need to ~2 hours per day - Flying Tigers Super Rifle: High-capacity assault rifle (CE compatible) - Flying Tigers Elite Helmet: Elite head protection - Flying Tigers Elite Armor: Elite combat armor
Requires Combat Extended to function properly.
Note: If you do NOT use Combat Extended, use "Super weapons and armors Vanilla" instead.
